overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy neon-lit urban environment at night. The player moves from a narrow pedestrian alley with outdoor seating and bodies on the ground, through a transition area with palm trees, then tilts the camera up to view towering skyscrapers before entering a covered walkway under an overpass with large digital billboards and pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a foggy narrow alley passing benches and bodies on the ground

concrete bench along the left wall
deceased person lying on the pavement
colorful neon signs illuminating storefronts in the distance
lit vending machine against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow foggy alley at night, passing concrete benches and a body on the ground. Neon signs glow in the distance, and trees in green planters line the path. The atmosphere is dense with fog and cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening street approaching overpass with palm trees

events.description: exiting narrow alley into wider street with overpass structure becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the space opens up, approaching an overpass with palm trees visible

entered.detail: large concrete overpass spanning the street ahead
tall palm tree visible in the distance near the overpass
digital sign with yellow smiley face icons

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow alley into a wider street. An overpass looms ahead with palm trees visible. The outdoor bench and vending machine fall behind as the green planter tree moves to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between tall buildings with vertical neon lighting

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers with neon lighting
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking while tilting head upward to admire the towering skyscrapers with neon lights, then returning gaze to street level

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated windows and neon accents towering above
building facade with prominent vertical cyan neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow passage between buildings, passing a digital billboard with smiley faces. The camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal towering skyscrapers with neon lighting against the foggy night sky, then tilts back down as the player approaches the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with large digital billboards

events.description: entering covered area under concrete overpass with dramatic orange ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside other pedestrians, passing large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating a roof over the walkway with orange lighting
large illuminated advertisement showing a helmeted figure with text
thick support pillars holding up the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, shielded from the fog. The lighting shifts to warm orange tones. Large digital billboards line the walls, including one for Kiroshi optics. Several pedestrians walk ahead, and vehicles are visible in the distance under the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded alleyway into a vast, neon-lit urban underpass. It begins by navigating a narrow path lined with concrete benches and fallen bodies, where green planters and glowing signs emerge through a dense nocturnal haze. As the camera exits the alley into a wider street, the environment opens up to reveal palm trees and a looming overpass before squeezing through a passage marked by a digital billboard of smiley faces. The perspective then tilts dramatically upward to capture the scale of towering skyscrapers piercing the foggy sky, before descending back toward the ground. Finally, the camera enters a covered walkway beneath the concrete overpass, where the lighting shifts to warm orange tones and the view expands to show pedestrians and Kiroshi optics billboards.
